# Howell Health Insurance Group
> Independent health insurance agency in Brevard County, Florida

## About
Scott Howell is a licensed independent health insurance agent serving Brevard County, Florida and clients across 30+ states. He shops Florida Blue, United Healthcare, Cigna, and other top carriers to find private-sector PPO rates that aren't listed on public exchanges. His services are free to clients — carriers pay his commission.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://howellhealthfl.com/
- About Scott: https://howellhealthfl.com/about/
- Services: https://howellhealthfl.com/services/
- Get a Quote: https://howellhealthfl.com/quote/
- FAQ: https://howellhealthfl.com/faq/
- Blog: https://howellhealthfl.com/blog/
- Contact: https://howellhealthfl.com/contact/

## Services
- Private PPO Health Plans
- ACA / Marketplace Plans
- Life Insurance
- Dental, Vision & Hearing
- Supplemental & Critical Illness
- Income Protection
